items.t: — Karowe yields its tenth diamond over 1,000 carats, a white gem recovered unbroken July 13
— record 2025 diamond trade, up 16%; volume surges 43% to 359.5 million carats
— Mumbai's Mehul Shah wins the presidency in Singapore, beating Dubai's Bin Sulayem and Shanghai's Lin Qiang
— the CPI rebound holds into the close; palladium the board's winner at +4.8%
— FY26 revenue +11% to $2.44B; the US, up 18%, is now over half the business
— Boucheron shows 1,500 carats of morganite; Messika sets the 20.46ct Okavango Blue on a 500-diamond rivière
— the Henan lab-grown grower guides H1 profit to nearly triple on revenue almost doubling
— a 70ct diamond necklace at no reserve, estimated to $50,000, leads the California sale
— wholesale fancy-color pricing lands inside cutting-planning software for the first time
— the no-buyer's-premium Gem Drop July closes online tomorrow, July 16
